name: Team Collaboration
description: Teams with real-time Yjs document editing
details: Team-based collaboration with shared documents and real-time collaborative editing. Demonstrates useTeams hook for team management, 'team' permission level for team-scoped access, teamField for linking records to teams, and useYjsText for real-time collaborative text editing.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { teamsSchemas } from './schemas/teams-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import TeamsPage from './pages/TeamsPage'
